name: @smithy-hono/deploy-node
description: One-command Node/Docker/Kubernetes deploy for smithy-hono apps: given a domain, builds the API (and optional same-origin SPA front-door) container images, generates + syncs secrets into a k8s Secret, renders the Deployment/Service/Ingress/ConfigMap manifests, and applies them — UI + API same-origin under an /api/* prefix via an nginx reverse proxy. Config-driven via smithy-node-deploy.config.{mjs,json}; node-only CLI.
